comments.author: maxine--basel--refactor-subcommand-structure
comments.content: Plan: Restructure main.rs Commands enum to introduce IssueCommands, TimerCommands, and MigrateCommands sub-enums. Add hidden top-level shortcuts (Create, Quick, List, Show, Close) and aliases (new, issues, subissue, start, stop). Add --parent flag to issue create/quick. Normalize --dry_run to --dry-run. Refactor dispatch match block. Single file change (main.rs) plus minor create.rs update for --parent.

comments.author: maxine--basel
comments.content: Completed integration tests for subcommand refactor: 30 tests covering canonical paths (issue/timer <verb>), alias hint emission, top-level shortcuts, and --dry-run normalization. All pass. Ready for review.

comments.author: maxine--refactor-command--reinit
comments.content: Committed: feat: refactor CLI into issue/timer/migrate subcommand groups [CL-157] (a8311ba) | Files: 2 files changed, 1316 insertions(+), 405 deletions(-)
